TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 120 

HLTH_HOME_PRVDR_NPI 

LABEL: Health Home Provider NPI 

DESCRIPTION: The National Provider ID (NPI) of the health home provider. 

SHORT NAME: HLTH_HOME_PRVDR_NPI 

LONG NAME: HLTH_HOME_PRVDR_NPI 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 10 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): OT header 

VALUES: https://www.cms.gov/Regulations-and-Guidance/Administrative-
Simplification/NationalProvI
